description: Style NoteCrafted from pure leather, this fossil belt has a refined finish complemented by its smart gunmetal buckle. Fossil leather breathes, regulates temperature to suit the climate, prevents dust penetration and has high ripping resistance that makes it a must-have in your wardrobe!Product DetailsBrown belt made of leather, with stitched detailing on the sides Tang clasp with a fixed loop to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in placeHoles to customise fitBranding embossed at the end of the beltMaterial and CareLeatherUse a brass polish to maintain buckle shineUse a branded leather conditioner to protect the belt
